# Contributing

1. Read [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) and [PROJECT_DOSSIER.md](../PROJECT_DOSSIER.md) before starting
2. Create a feature branch: `feat/<name>` or `exp/<name>`
3. Follow the coding standards in PROJECT_DOSSIER.md
4. Use schemas from `schemas/` — don't create parallel types
5. Run tests: `uv run pytest`
6. Open a PR using the template
7. Update docs if you changed any interface
